ab.1.b: Through our booking tool or contact form, you let us know the date, location and number of guests. It takes less than two minutes and is completely non-binding.
ab.2.b: We get back to you within 24 hours. Together we choose your package and flavours and craft a concept that fits your event perfectly.
ab.3.b: We tailor the cups and counter to your event — with your branding, a colour scheme or a particular style. You receive a final, fully transparent quote.
ab.4.b: We arrive in good time, set up our stylish mobile bar and prepare everything. Travel, setup and staff are of course included.
ab.5.b: Right before your guests' eyes, we whisk every matcha fresh with a bamboo whisk. A visual and flavourful experience that brings people together.
ab.6.b: After the event, we pack everything up again and leave your space exactly as we found it. You simply enjoy your celebration.
ab.cta.title: Ready to secure your date?
ab.q.body: Professional hygiene is standard with us — so you and your guests can enjoy the day completely carefree. Certified indulgence, from the first sip to the last.
ab.q.lead: Behind the scenes, we leave nothing to chance. Every member of our service team is rigorously trained, certified and verified in accordance with §§ 42, 43 IfSG.
ab.q.title: Cleanliness is our foundation
ab.sub: We make it as easy as possible for you. You sit back — we take care of the rest.
ab.title: From the idea to the perfect matcha moment
addon.4.b: A little keepsake for your guests.
addon.title: Make your experience complete
an.1.b: An elegant matcha reception as the unforgettable highlight — matched to your colours and your style. The live preparation becomes the talk of the day.
an.2.b: Tradition meets the modern: a stylish matcha bar that fits the festive atmosphere of a henna night perfectly and delights every guest.
an.3.b: From a milestone anniversary to an intimate gathering — freshly whisked matcha in fruity variations makes every birthday special.
an.4.b: A modern, healthy touch for team events, product launches and trade fairs — with your branding on the cups and counter.
an.5.b: Refreshing iced matcha creations for warm days — the perfect alternative to classic drinks, healthy and stylish.
an.6.b: Beautifully presented and lovingly prepared — an experience that takes any private celebration to the next level.
an.custom.body: No problem. We design every catering experience individually — from the choice of flavours to the look of the stand. Tell us about your idea, and we'll make it happen.
an.custom.title: Don't see your occasion?
an.sub: Whether an intimate gathering or a grand celebration — we turn every occasion into a stylish matcha experience your guests won't forget any time soon.
an.title: For every special moment

ds.1.v:
The controller within the meaning of the GDPR is:
Nour Khammar, Aloeweg 44, 51109 Köln
Email: matchamadness.cgn@gmail.com
ds.2.v: When you use our contact or booking form, we process the data you provide (e.g. name, email, phone, event details) solely to handle your request. We do not share it with third parties without your consent.
ds.3.v: When the website is accessed, technically necessary information (e.g. browser type, operating system, time of access) is recorded automatically. This data does not allow any conclusions to be drawn about your identity.
ds.4.v: This website only stores your language preference locally in your browser (localStorage). No tracking or marketing cookies are used.
ds.5.v: You have the right at any time to access, rectify, erase and restrict the processing of your data, as well as the right to object and to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority. To do so, please contact the address listed above.
ds.intro: Protecting your personal data is important to us. Below, we explain how personal data is processed when you visit this website.
ds.note: Note: This is a simplified sample template and does not replace individual legal advice.
ds.title: Privacy policy
feat.1.body: Exclusively certified organic matcha, sourced directly from Japan's finest growing regions. Deep green, finely creamy and free of bitterness — the sun of Japan, right here in the Rhineland.
feat.1.title: Uncompromising organic quality
feat.2.body: Every member of our service team is rigorously trained, certified and verified in accordance with §§ 42, 43 IfSG. Professional hygiene is standard with us — so you can enjoy completely carefree.
feat.2.title: Safety & professionalism
feat.3.body: A truly all-inclusive, worry-free package with no hidden costs: service, travel and a variety of milk options are already included. You pay one fair, fixed price — we take care of the rest.
feat.3.title: Full cost transparency
feat.title: Three promises that make the difference
flav.sub: From traditional matcha to fruity variations — every creation freshly prepared and individually tailored to your event.
flav.title: From purely classic to playfully fruity
footer.credit: Designed by Ummah Collective
footer.tagline: Premium mobile matcha catering that turns your event into a stylish experience — fresh, beautiful and unforgettable.
fq.1.a: We offer thoroughly thought-out matcha catering that adapts flexibly to your event: our mobile matcha bar with freshly prepared matcha, traditional live preparation right before your guests' eyes, and an individually designed counter with personalised cups and a branded setup.
fq.2.a: Three things: uncompromising organic quality straight from Japan, certified professionalism in accordance with §§ 42, 43 IfSG, and full cost transparency with no hidden costs. Service and travel are always included.
fq.2.q: What sets you apart from others?
fq.3.a: We work with fair, fixed prices from 299€ (Paket S). Each package is a flexible starting point that we tailor to your wishes. There are no hidden costs — staff, setup, teardown and travel are included.
fq.3.q: What does your pricing look like?
fq.4.a: We're out and about in Cologne, Bonn, Düsseldorf, Leverkusen and Bergisch-Gladbach. Travel within this area is included in the price. For events outside it, simply get in touch.
fq.5.a: Our packages are designed for around 50 people and up. For travel under 15 km, smaller groups are possible too — just ask, and we'll find a solution.
fq.5.q: What's the minimum number of guests?
fq.6.a: From classic, purist matcha to fruity variations like strawberry, raspberry, vanilla, mango and more. The number of flavours depends on the package you choose and can be expanded at any time.
fq.7.a: Yes. Whether classic milk or modern options like oat, almond or coconut — your guests get only high-quality products, at no extra charge.
fq.7.q: Do you offer plant-based milk alternatives?
fq.8.a: The easiest way is through our booking tool or contact form. You can also reach us directly by email or via Instagram. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
fq.8.q: How can I get in touch?
fq.sub: Everything you need to know about our matcha catering. Don't see your question? Just drop us a line.
fq.title: Frequently asked questions

incl.1.b: We learned our craft from Japanese teishus and never charge any extra staff costs.
incl.2.b: Whether Cologne, Düsseldorf, Leverkusen, Bergisch-Gladbach or Bonn — travel costs are already covered.
incl.3.b: Whether classic milk or modern options (oat, almond, coconut) — only high-quality products, at no extra charge.
incl.sub: The only thing we love more than our matcha is happy guests. That's why our prices come with no hidden costs.
incl.title: The “No Surprises” package
intro.lead: We're Matcha Madness — your personal partner for exclusive, mobile matcha catering. We turn your event into a moment that delights, surprises and stays in the memory.
intro.p1: Whether a henna night, wedding, birthday or summer party: with freshly prepared matcha creations, premium ingredients and a beautifully styled stand, we create an atmosphere your guests don't just enjoy — they experience it.
intro.title:
More than catering.
An experience.

test.1.q: “The absolute highlight of our wedding. The live preparation was a real experience and the matcha was simply incredible.”
test.2.q: “Professional, punctual and beautifully designed. Our guests still talk about it today.”
test.3.q: “Finally something different from the usual drinks bar. High quality, stylish and really delicious.”
test.4.q: “The personalised cups with our logo were a wonderful eye-catcher. Absolutely recommended for any corporate event.”
test.5.q: “So easy from the request all the way to teardown. The matcha was the star of our summer party.”
test.6.q: “Beautiful presentation, a friendly team and a taste that won everyone over — even the matcha sceptics.”
test.title: Loved by hosts across the Rhineland
tm.cta.title: Become our next success story
tm.sub: Over 150 events — and countless moments guests remember long afterwards.
tm.title: Loved by hosts across the Rhineland
ue.mission.body: Matcha Madness is more than catering. It's a highlight that takes your event to the next level. With us, you won't find anything standard.
ue.mission.title: Revolutionising the matcha experience — one event at a time.
ue.story.lead: Long before matcha became a trend, it was a firm part of our everyday life.
ue.story.p1: That made it all the more frustrating that, at events, we found a wide choice of drinks but almost always missed one thing: high-quality, freshly prepared matcha. That's exactly how Matcha Madness came to be.
ue.story.p2: We didn't just want to fill a gap, but to create an entirely new experience — one that brings together quality, beauty and atmosphere. That's why we bring matcha to where it's been missing: straight to your event.
ue.story.title: A passion project
ue.sub: What began as a personal passion is today an experience we share with the whole Rhineland.
ue.title: Out of love for real matcha
ue.val.1.b: We tasted our way through many kinds of matcha until we found our favourite. Only certified organic matcha from Japan ends up in the bowl.
ue.val.2.b: Every drink is prepared with care, every counter designed individually. It's not just about taste, but about the overall feeling.
ue.val.3.b: A modern, healthy lifestyle that pairs elegance with indulgence. Your guests get curious, take a sip — and remember it for a long time.
ue.val.title: Our values
